title: Subscriber & Content Analytics
description: Track subscriber churn, content performance, ad revenue, and audience engagement across streaming plans and content genres.
prerequisites: Azure AD account with Fabric workspace creation permissions

sampleData.description: 10,000 subscriber records with plan, region, churn flag, and monthly fee
2,000 content items with genre, type, duration, and release year
200,000 viewing records with watch duration, device type, and rating
100,000 ad impression records with clicks, revenue, and ad type

fabricItems.name: media_lakehouse
fabricItems.description: Central lakehouse for all media analytics data

fabricItems.name: 01_bronze_ingest
fabricItems.description: Ingest raw CSV files into Bronze Delta tables

fabricItems.name: 02_silver_transform
fabricItems.description: Clean, validate, derive tenure, churn flags, completion rates, and ad CTR

fabricItems.name: 03_gold_aggregate
fabricItems.description: 6 Gold tables: subscriber metrics, content performance, churn analysis, ad revenue, weekly trends, subscriber scorecards

fabricItems.name: 04_reporting_views
fabricItems.description: SQL views: executive summary, churn risk, content performance, ad revenue breakdown

fabricItems.name: 05_dashboard
fabricItems.description: Interactive HTML dashboard with KPI cards, churn trends, content top-10, and ad revenue

fabricItems.name: media_analytics_model
fabricItems.description: Direct Lake model with subscriber, content, and ad revenue measures

fabricItems.name: Subscriber & Content Dashboard
fabricItems.description: 3-page dashboard: Subscriber Health, Content Performance, Ad Revenue

fabricItems.name: daily_media_pipeline
fabricItems.description: Orchestrates all notebooks sequentially with retry
